An '''Electro-collar''' was a restraining device that would be strapped to a prisoner's neck. It could be remotely triggered to explode and kill the wearer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''

[[Category:Restraining devices]]
